Restoring Mobility & Dignity

To the dogs who served. We provide mobile, off-grid hydrotherapy and acoustic resonance bathing for retired military, police, and search-and-rescue dogs suffering from biomechanical trauma. Our self-contained clinical container deploys directly to your location, eliminating the stress of long-distance veterinary transport for animals already in chronic pain.

Track Our Mobile Unit

Our Mission

K9 Kinetic Recovery was founded on a single, non-negotiable principle: the dogs who protect us deserve the same quality of clinical rehabilitation available to human service personnel. These animals have endured years of explosive detection patrols, building clearances, mountain rescues, and high-speed tactical deployments — operations that systematically destroy joints, compress vertebrae, and tear soft tissue. Our mobile clinic exists because these dogs should not have to endure another stressful journey to receive the care they have earned. We bring the clinic to them, wherever they are, however remote the location.

Palliative & Restorative Care

Our specialised orthopaedic programmes facilitate a comfortable, pain-free retirement for service dogs with profound biomechanical trauma.

Advanced Hydro-Acoustic Therapy

Targeted sound wave bathing and precise water resistance alleviate osteoarthritis. Our 30°C underwater treadmill offloads up to 60% of body weight, while low-frequency acoustic transducers stimulate osteoblastic repair at the cellular level.

Mobile Off-Grid Clinic

Our self-contained, solar-assisted container clinic deploys anywhere. Equipped with hydrotherapy, acoustic resonance, and full diagnostics, it operates entirely off-grid to bring critical care to remote handlers and veterinary facilities.

Dignified Transition

We focus on deep physical and psychological restoration. Every treatment plan includes behavioural assessments that track temperament alongside mobility, ensuring the animal's emotional wellbeing is treated with profound clinical rigour.

Behavioural Decompression

Retired working dogs carry psychological weight. Our decompression programme uses scent-based calming and environmental enrichment to reduce baseline stress, enabling the parasympathetic nervous system to promote genuine tissue repair and restorative sleep.

Clinical Operations Showcase

Service Respected
Hydro-Acoustic Rehabilitation
Off-Grid Mobile Clinic

Our Core Modalities

  • Acoustic Resonance Bathing: Low-frequency sound waves (30–120Hz) applied in warm water to stimulate osteoblastic activity, reduce neuropathic pain signalling, and induce profound parasympathetic dominance for systemic relaxation.
  • Underwater Treadmill: Controlled, low-impact cardiovascular and musculoskeletal conditioning in a heated (30°C) aquatic environment. Hydrostatic pressure reduces load-bearing weight by up to 60%, allowing pain-free range-of-motion restoration.
  • Myofascial Release Massage: Targeted manual therapy breaking down scar tissue and fascial adhesions built up over years of repetitive operational strain. Performed by certified canine physiotherapists using palpation-guided technique.
  • Nutritional Support: Customised anti-inflammatory supplement protocols delivered alongside physical therapy, including omega-3 fatty acid loading, glucosamine/chondroitin joint complex, and turmeric-based curcumin formulations.
  • Thermal Imaging Diagnostics: Non-invasive infrared scanning to identify subclinical inflammation, circulatory abnormalities, and compensatory gait patterns that are invisible to the naked eye but critical for treatment planning.
  • Digital Radiography: On-site X-ray capability within the mobile unit for immediate skeletal assessment, fracture detection, and degenerative joint disease staging without requiring a separate veterinary referral visit.

Trusted by Handlers

"After five years in explosive detection, Rex could barely walk. K9 Kinetic's mobile unit came to our property and completely transformed his quality of life. The hydrotherapy gave him his dignity back." - Officer D. Miller, K9 Unit Handler
"Our search-and-rescue dogs endured punishing terrain for years. The acoustic resonance bathing was something I had never seen before — within three sessions, my dog's gait improved noticeably and the behavioural changes were remarkable." - Sgt. R. Campbell, Mountain Rescue Team Leader
150+ Service Dogs Treated
98% Handler Satisfaction
12 Regional Sectors Covered
Veterinary Approved Protocols

Schedule a Mobile Visit

Our clinical container can be deployed to your location anywhere in the United Kingdom. Give your retired partner the care they have earned through years of loyal service.
